rows.notes: Consensus. Clearly a header with no monetary amounts. Gemini-flash, GPT-5-mini, and Claude-haiku all agreed on the description and absence of amounts, with a minor punctuation difference in Claude-haiku's description.
Consensus. Section header with no monetary amounts. All extractors agreed.
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Quit Rents' and amounts 7/18/2. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Dried Rents' and provided incorrect amounts (29/7/2).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 377/13/9. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (72) and shillings (19). Its note indicated minor ink variation, suggesting uncertainty.
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 54/1/11. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (15) and shillings (4).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 3/3/0, with a dot indicating zero pence. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (9).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 321/1/3. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (100).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 97/6/8. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (110) and shillings (9).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Donations to Churches &c' and amounts 55/18/4. Claude-haiku truncated the description and misread the pounds (122).

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Other expenses' and amounts 51/5/10. Claude-haiku misread description ('Misc. expenses') and amounts (133/7/10), and provided confused notes about pence validity.

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms subtotal amounts 968/8/11. This amount is distinct from the entry on the same line and positioned to the far right. Claude-haiku misread the shillings (5) and incorrectly included the amount as the description.
Consensus. Section header with no monetary amounts. Gemini-flash, GPT-5-mini, and Claude-haiku all agreed, with a minor punctuation difference in Claude-haiku's description.
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 530/13/2. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (14).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 652/17/9. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (55).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Chapel Services &c' and amounts 199/5/3. Claude-haiku truncated the description and misread the pounds (46).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 348/8/3. Gemini-flash's note about the faint page reference '76' indicates careful observation. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (50).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 1256/12/1. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (50).

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Table Allowances' and amounts 1357/4/7. GPT-5-mini misread pounds (135) and shillings (14). Claude-haiku misread description ('Allowance') and all amounts (95/4/9).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 58/13/11. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (105).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Maintenance of Est:' and amounts 909/4/1. Claude-haiku misread description ('Lost:') and pounds (118).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 1100/0/0, with dots indicating zero shillings and pence. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (130).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 1170/0/0, with dots indicating zero shillings and pence. Claude-haiku misread the pounds (155).
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Scholars:-' as a header/section label with no amounts. Claude-haiku incorrectly identified it as an 'entry'.

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Foundation' as an entry and amounts 1346/19/11. Claude-haiku misread the type ('header'), description ('Founders of Trust'), and pounds (146).

Selected GPT-5-mini/Claude-haiku for amounts. Visual verification confirms 'Trust' and amounts 826/16/0. The pence column is blank with a faint dot, indicating zero pence. Gemini-flash misread shillings (1) and pence (6). Claude-haiku incorrectly used the amounts as its description.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'College Officers' is a header/section label with no amounts. GPT-5-mini and Claude-haiku incorrectly identified it as an 'entry' and assigned amounts that belong to the subsequent line.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'The sd Exp.' and amounts 100/0/0. GPT-5-mini skipped this row entirely, assigning the next line's content here. Claude-haiku misread the description ('The Sundrie Fence').
Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'The Tuition Fund' is a header. GPT-5-mini combined this header with its amount into a single entry. Claude-haiku misidentified this row.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms this is the entry amount for 'The Tuition Fund' (from the previous header), with no explicit description on this line. GPT-5-mini incorrectly assigned these amounts to the header. Claude-haiku misidentified this row.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'The Exhibition Fund.' is a header. GPT-5-mini combined this header with its amount into a single entry and misread 'Fund' as 'Funds'. Claude-haiku misidentified this row.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms this is the entry amount for 'The Exhibition Fund' (from the previous header), with no explicit description on this line. GPT-5-mini incorrectly assigned these amounts to the header. Claude-haiku misidentified this row.
Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Other expenses.' and amounts 1/2/0, with a dot for pence. Claude-haiku misread description ('Misc. expenses.') and amounts (155/4/2).

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms subtotal amounts 12339/9/1. This amount is distinct from the entry on the same line and positioned to the far right. Claude-haiku did not identify this subtotal.

Consensus, preferring Gemini-flash/Claude-haiku's exact punctuation. Section header with no monetary amounts. All extractors agreed on content, with a minor punctuation difference in GPT-5-mini's description.

Selected Gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Common University Fund' and amounts 95/10/6. The amount is right-aligned in a separate grand total section. Gemini-flash correctly noted this alignment. GPT-5-mini incorrectly stated it was aligned with previous columns. Claude-haiku misread description ('Common Utility Fund') and amounts (205/0/0).

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Total payments' and amounts 13403/8/6. GPT-5-mini's note on verifying by summing subtotals is a strong indicator of accuracy. Claude-haiku misread type ('entry') and amounts (9570/6/0).

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Balance to Gen Acct II.' and amounts 897/6/8. GPT-5-mini's description 'Gen Acct II' is slightly more accurate regarding the punctuation. Claude-haiku misread description ('Balance to New Account') and amounts (13608/8/6).

Selected Gemini-flash/GPT-5-mini. Visual verification confirms the final grand total amounts 14300/15/2 with no explicit description on the page. GPT-5-mini's cross-checking note by summing previous totals is excellent. Claude-haiku incorrectly used the amount as its description.
